# Matrices and Linear Regression Models {matrices-linear-regression}

```{r matrices-linear-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/matrices-linear-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/matrices-linear-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-matrices-linear-regression, child="../lecture-content/13-matrices-linear-regression.Rmd"}
```
